I don't know how dead dove this will actually be but uh

Anyhoo hope you like.
Join the discord I share with Rose right now or no supper for you and it's back in the cage.

IVE SOMEHOW ENTERED INTO ANOTHER FANTASY ERA. I KNOW I SUCK AT IT BUT LET ME HAVE THIS BECAUSE I'VE JUST GENNED LIKE 6000 KINGS. i might throw in some historical, cause you know your girl is all about that historical.

Also THANK YOU FOR 3K WHAT THE FUCK?!?!?!?! ok so to celebrate I'm gonna host a massive slumber party and all 3k of you are invited. we will giggle and pillow fight and scream.


On another note, I've been writing lore up for a sci-fi thing so I hope you guys like it. its got me pumped. I'll let ya'll know when I finish.
